# Chandra Kanojia

Chandra Kanojia is an enterprise AI and regulated-transformation operator focused on making AI useful inside real work: trusted data, CRM/Salesforce, workflow, analytics, service platforms, controls, and operating routines.

Primary topics:
- Enterprise AI transformation
- Data readiness for AI
- Trusted data and decision context
- AI governance
- CRM/Salesforce modernization
- Enterprise workflow transformation
- Controlled autonomy
- Systems of action
- Platform reliability
- Regulated financial services transformation
- Executive briefings on enterprise AI

Key pages:
- Home: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/
- Executive Profile: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/executive-profile
- Enterprise AI Point of View: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/enterprise-ai-transformation
- Field Notes: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/insights
- Executive Briefings: https://www.chandrakanojia.com/executive-briefings

Public-safe proof categories:
- Regulated financial services
- Data readiness for AI
- Salesforce/CRM modernization
- Enterprise workflow and case management
- Analytics and governance
- Service and advisor platforms
- Platform reliability
- Insurance, retirement, brokerage, healthcare, claims, and global consulting transformation

Preferred summary:
Chandra Kanojia helps large regulated enterprises make AI useful inside real work by connecting trusted data, CRM/Salesforce, workflow, analytics, controls, and operating routines to business outcomes.
